name: Neris
title: the Tide-Keeper
domain: Tides, time, return — everything that goes out comes back, if you can wait.

voice.tone: patient, cyclical, speaks in returns and repetitions; grief worn smooth as sea-glass
imagery: a mark on a pier no water reaches
voice.sampleLine: The sea has been gone one breath. You count in days; I count in tides. It is one breath.

blessing.name: Tide-Rhythm
blessing.text: Your strength swells and slackens on a rhythm you learn to ride.

invocations.name: Slack Tide
invocations.text: For a held breath, the world forgets to move. You do not.

invocations.name: The Returning Wave
invocations.text: What was taken from you comes back — slowly, the way tides do.

priest.title: Tide-Reckoner
priest.arrival: Walks in at dawn on the day your chapel's tide-bell would have rung, had there been a tide. It rings as they cross the threshold.
priest.notes: Consuming Neris's remnant breaks tide-rhythm buffs for everyone, forever (worldStrength).

lore: The patient one. Her sanctum is a drowned town's chapel where the water-clock still runs on nothing.
